case_summary: No hot water but no visible leak — symptoms point at a failed heating element / electrical fault, NOT plumbing.

ground_truth.notes: Critical disambiguation: when the geyser is dry but not heating, the right trade is Electrical (geyser_electrical), not Plumbing. Tests the trade boundary documented in the taxonomy excludes block — Plumbing geyser excludes element/thermostat faults.

inputs.user_text: Our geyser isn't producing any hot water any more. There's no leak — drip tray is dry, no water marks on the ceiling. The geyser is on, and we can hear the breaker hasn't tripped, but the water just stays cold. We checked the breaker in the DB board, it's still in the on position.
